title: Formula support within workflows
excerpt: I’d like to request the ability to use formulas within workflow actions to cast calculated content to fields (e.g. being able to manipulate text or date data and then casting the result to a column)

posts.author: KylieJ (Kylie Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to request the ability to use formulas within workflow actions to cast calculated content to fields (e.g. being able to manipulate text or date data and then casting the result to a column)

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kyle,

We thought this would be great to so we’ve added this to our app Workflow Extensions.

Feel free to install it and try it for free for 14 days. You can also checkout our documentation for more info.
Best,

Maarten
